acceptance_criteria: Harness runs zero tests cleanly on Windows + Linux.
Mock helpers are reusable from any unit test file.
prd_refs: §11.2: tests must avoid writing outside `TestDrive:` or temp directories.
description: Stand up the Pester 5+ test harness so every subsequent task can land tests first. The harness must work cross-platform, never write outside `TestDrive:` or system temp, and skip integration tests by default (require `SLASHOPS_RUN_INTEGRATION=1`).
notes: Pester v5 syntax differs sharply from v4 — pin the minimum version in the config.
Avoid `Set-StrictMode -Version Latest` globally; opt-in per test file.
steps: TDD: `pwsh -File ./build/test.ps1` exits 0 with zero tests defined.
TDD: `Invoke-Pester -Path ./tests/Unit` finds and runs zero tests cleanly.
TDD: Setting `$env:SLASHOPS_RUN_INTEGRATION = '1'` enables `-Tag Integration` runs; otherwise they are excluded.
TDD: Mock helpers from `tests/_helpers/MockHelpers.ps1` are dot-sourceable from any test file.

Author `tests/PesterConfig.ps1` returning a Pester `Configuration` object with: `Run.Path = ./tests/Unit`, `Output.Verbosity = 'Detailed'`, `Run.PassThru = $true`, `TestResult.Enabled = $true`, `TestResult.OutputPath = ./tests/_results/unit.xml`.
Author `build/test.ps1` that imports Pester, applies the config, optionally appends Integration path when `$env:SLASHOPS_RUN_INTEGRATION -eq '1'`, and exits non-zero on failures.
Author `tests/_helpers/MockHelpers.ps1` with utility mocks: `Mock-OllamaChat`, `Mock-GetCommand`, `Mock-FileSystemUnderTestDrive`. Each must be a parameterised function callable from `BeforeAll`.
name: [f-03] Pester 5+ test harness and conventions
